product: Serverless GPU compute now supports H100 accelerators (Beta)
tagline: Serverless GPU compute now supports on demand H100 accelerators for single node workflows and jobs.
what_it_does: Serverless GPU compute now supports on demand H100 accelerators for single node workflows and jobs. This feature is in Beta. Public Preview AI Runtime for single node tasks is in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: You can use AI Runtime to train and fine tune custom models using your favorite frameworks and get state of the art efficiency, performance, and quality.
plain_summary: Serverless GPU compute now supports on demand H100 accelerators for single node workflows and jobs. This feature is in Beta.
key_takeaway: Serverless GPU compute now supports on demand H100 accelerators for single node workflows and jobs.
